name: Corsy
summary: Introduction Corsy is a lightweight program that scans for all known misconfigurations in CORS implementations.

documentation.readme: Introduction Corsy is a lightweight program that scans for all known misconfigurations in CORS implementations.
usage_sections: Usage: Using Corsy is pretty simple python3 corsy.py -u https://example.com Scan URLs from a file python3 corsy.py -i /path/urls.txt Scan URLs from stdin cat urls.txt | python3 corsy.py Number of threads python3 corsy.py -u https://example.com -t 20 Delay between requests python3 corsy.
documentation.how_to_use: Clone or install `Corsy` from its upstream repository, then run `Corsy --help` (or the README entrypoint) to confirm flags. Introduction Corsy is a lightweight program that scans for all known misconfigurations in CORS implementations.
